markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Cloudflare

Curated list of awesome Cloudflare worker recipes, open-source projects, guides, blogs and other resources.

Cloudflare provides content delivery network (CDN) services, DDoS mitigation, Internet security and distributed domain name server (DNS) services, sitting between the visitor and the Cloudflare user's hosting provider, acting as a reverse proxy for websites.

Contents

  • Community
  • Blog
  • DNS
  • Developers
  • Apps
    • Open Source
  • Workers
    • Reference
    • Tools
    • Recipes
  • Other

Community

  • Forum
  • Reddit
  • @Cloudflare on Twitter
  • Facebook
  • YouTube
  • GitHub
  • GitHub Topic
  • Stack Exchange
  • Stack Overflow
  • Server Fault

Blog

  • Official Blog

DNS

  • DNS Zone Filesstars32 - Ready to import common config zone files for easy configuration of various services.
  • Lexiconstars1k - CLI tool to manipulate DNS records on various DNS providers in a standardized way.
  • Th3inspectorstars1.1k - All in one CLI tool for information gathering.
  • Partner Panelstars1.2k - Tool for hosting partners to provide a DNS management panel for customers.
  • CFPMPstars197 - Partner management panel.
  • Flaresstars156 - DNS backup tool.
  • Block Bad Bot Rulesetstars118 - Collection of rulesets to block malicious crawlers with firewall rules.
  • Docker DDNSstars508 - Docker image to use the free DNS Service as a dynamic DNS provider.
  • DDNS script for Synologystars233 - DDNS script for Synology NAS.
  • Dynamic DNS Bashstars130 - Dynamic DNS updater in bash script.
  • Dynamic DNS PHPstars143 - Dynamic DNS updater in PHP.
  • Dynamic DNS Pythonstars147 - Dynamic DNS updater in python.
  • Multi-Provider DDNS Scriptstars44 - Multiple providers ddns script without dependencies.
  • Argo Tunnel Clientstars1.3k - CLI client for Argo tunnel, a tunneling daemon that proxies any local webserver through the Cloudflare network.
  • Upperstars91 - Speeds up craft dramatically using a cache proxy in front of your webserver.
  • Cloud Busterstars129 - A comprehensive pentest tool that checks sites for origin IP leaks.
  • CLI Toolstars126 - CLI tool for interacting with Cloudflare.
  • Detectorstars13 - Detect whether a site is running behind Cloudflare.
  • Scrapestars2.4k - Python module to bypass anti-bot page.
  • CloudFlairstars1.2k - Tool to find origin servers of websites protected by CloudFlare who are publicly exposed.

Developers

  • Developers Hub - Developer docs including API reference, articles, and sample code for all products.
  • Open Source - Official open-source projects.
  • API Docs - API documentation.
  • Integration Resources - Plugins for content management systems, control panels, cloud providers, ecommerce platforms and more.
  • Technical Resources - Technical tools and resources.
  • The Serverlist Newsletter - The serverlist is a Cloudflare-curated newsletter about all things serverless.

Apps

Cloudflare Apps lets you ship your tool or service to millions of sites. Any Cloudflare customer can preview & install your code on their site in seconds.

  • Apps Directory
  • Documentation
  • Developer Fund
  • App Ideasstars34

Open Source

  • Official OSS Apps - Collection of official apps.
  • Logflarestars28 - Log management & event analytics.

Workers

Cloudflare Workers provides a serverless execution environment that allows you to create entirely new applications or augment existing ones without configuring or maintaining infrastructure.

Reference

  • Documentation
  • Tutorials
  • Runtime
  • Workers KV

Tools

  • Wranglerstars2.2k - wrangler is a CLI tool designed for folks who are interested in using Cloudflare workers.
  • Playground - Simple, instant way to preview and test code directly in the browser against any site.
  • Serverless Plugin - Plugin for serverless frameworkstars39.7k to develop and deploy serverless applications using Workers.
  • Worker App Kitstars66 - Handy set of tools for creating, developing, testing, and deploying worker app.
  • GitHub Actionstars10 - Deploy a worker on push to the master branch.
  • Workers KV Viewerstars21 - CLI based interactive viewer for workers KV storage.
  • Redirect Management - Generate redirect worker.

Recipes

  • Examples Collectionstars567 - Collection of recipes.
  • Hello World JS Boilerplatestars71 - Template for kick starting a worker project in JS.
  • Hello World Rust Boilerplatestars150 - Template for kick starting a worker project using wasm-pack.
  • Routerstars117 - Router that can be used with REST APIs or apps for basic routing logic.
  • Staticstars8 - Generate a static HTML or JSON page from raw strings in your workers script.
  • Fetchstars13 - Examples of making fetch requests and generating JSON post requests.
  • Incoming Requeststars0 - Examples of reading in a POST request body of type JSON and form-data.
  • Redirectstars5 - Examples of sending single and bulk redirects from a Worker script.
  • Img-Colorstars17 - Retrieve the dominant color of a png or jpeg image.
  • Binaststars3 - Serve binast via a worker.
  • Pwnage Protectionstars128 - Secure password scoring and user pwnage protection api - Usage.
  • Cache Purger Proxy - Proxies purge cache requests - Usage.
  • URL Routerstars72 - Fast url router - Usage.
  • Edge Proxystars54 - Enable A/B testing, canary releasing, gatekeeping, and SEO A/B/N testing.
  • Blue / Green Deploymentsstars14 - Working example of blue / green deployments with canary releasing.
  • Preact PWAstars57 - Preact progressive web app.
  • CURL Interceptorstars30 - Intercepts requests from curl command and returns something different.
  • Worker with built-in Routerstars35 - Allows you to separate your worker logic into different functions and/or controllers.
  • Connecting to Google Storage - Pull files from Google's cloud storage.
  • CSRF Protection - Protect any origin from CSRF by verifying origin/referer headers.
  • URL Query Strings Parser - Parse url query strings.
  • Regrex Replacement and Injection - Perform regex replacements and inject CSS/JS.
  • Webpack Boilerplatestars102 - Boilerplate to build, bundle and deploy workers with webpack.
  • Basic Authstars69 - Protection using basic auth.
  • Send Logs to Logdnastars21 - Simple recipe to send logs to logdna.
  • IP lookup servicestars21 - IP lookup service using workers.
  • Airtable Proxystars92 - Allows you to make secure requests to the Airtable API from your frontend.
  • TypeScript Workersstars99 - Types and mocks for building a tested typescript worker.
  • Proxiesstars46 - Makes it easy to build workers, by providing high-level proxying primitives addressing common needs.
  • Static Workerstars8 - Provides functions that make it easy to host a static website.
  • Bannerostars4 - Bannero image API for simpledesktops.
  • Hasurastars15 - Example using Facebook-based authorization and graphql proxy queries with hasura.
  • IP Redirects - Redirect users based on their ip address.
  • Switch Image to WebP - Reroute image to webp when supported.
  • Geographic Routing and Load Balancer - Geographic routing and load balancing with workers.
  • UTM Tag Stripper - Strip UTM tags in query string.
  • Short URL Redirector - Redirect short links.
  • Repo Huntstars36 - Find cool open-source projects daily.
  • Performance Optimized Workersstars113 - Collection of worker scripts, generally focused on performance optimizations.
  • Google reCAPTCHA verificationstars11 - Handle the server-side verification of your reCAPTCHA form.

Other

  • Support
  • System Status
  • Network Map

Contribute

Contributions welcome! Read the contribution guidelines first.
